judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but extremely high operating losses and a negative profit margin, with significant cash burn.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by a wide margin (-0.66 vs -0.20); next earnings date is 2026-08-10.
positives: Revenue growth 1952.2% YoY — explosive top-line expansion.
Total cash $3.03B vs $2.99B debt — liquidity is currently strong.
Current ratio 18.47 and Quick ratio 17.91 — excellent short-term solvency.
Analyst growth estimate for current FY is 12.6%.
negatives: Operating margin -1014.0% and Profit margin 0.0% — massive operational losses.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-1.41B — significant cash burn.
Forward P/E -317.81 and Price/Sales (TTM) 431.51 — valuation is extremely stretched.
Return on equity -37.8% and Return on assets -6.3% — poor profitability metrics.
